author: Author: Magerko
description: This application allows you to download videos and audio from various platforms.
enter_link_and_press_add: Paste a link and press '+' or Enter
empty_tip_dragdrop: Drag & drop links or a .txt file here
empty_tip_support: Supported: YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, VK, RuTube…
file_empty_or_invalid: File is empty or contains invalid data.
ffmpeg_not_found: FFmpeg not found. Please ensure it is in the assets/ffmpeg/bin folder.
ffmpeg_run_error: Error executing FFmpeg. Ensure the executable is not corrupted.
restart_required:
yt-dlp has been updated successfully!

Please restart the application for changes to take effect.
deno_not_found_message:
Deno JavaScript runtime is not installed.

YouTube downloads may not work properly without Deno.

Install Deno from: https://deno.com

Windows (PowerShell):
irm https://deno.land/install.ps1 | iex
clear_history_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history?
container_hint_remux: Streams are repackaged into MP4 in seconds, quality stays bit for bit identical. The codec itself stays as the site delivered it, which modern players and browsers handle fine.
container_hint_keep: The file is kept exactly as the site delivered it, usually WEBM or MKV. Fastest option, but such files do not open everywhere.
container_hint_convert: The video is compressed again. Takes minutes, loads the CPU heavily and costs some quality. Only needed for old players and TVs.
playlist_found_text: The link contains {count} videos. Add them all to the queue?
playlist_found_in_video: The link points to a video inside a playlist ({count} videos). What should be downloaded?
trim_hint: Only the selected part will be downloaded. Time can be written as 7:40, 1:02:15 or a number of seconds. An empty field means from the start or to the end.
trim_bad_start: Could not read the start. Example: 7:40
trim_bad_end: Could not read the end. Example: 1:02:15
end_before_start: The end must come after the start
start_after_end_of_video: The start is beyond the end of the video
end_after_end_of_video: The end is beyond the end of the video
format_hint: What the site offers for this particular video. One resolution is often available in several codecs: AV1 and VP9 are noticeably smaller than H.264 at the same quality, but older TVs and players cannot open them. Video-only tracks are merged with audio automatically.
